ListItem.Para: Exhaust shutoff valve is deactivated closed.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate forward cargo exhaust valve closed and deactivate the exhaust fan (AMM DDG 21-43-02).

ListItem.Para: Deactivate forward cargo heat exhaust shutoff valve closed.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
Gain access to the forward cargo heat exhaust shutoff valve.
Turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the CLOSED position.
Deactivate forward cargo heat exhaust fan.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:

OperationNote.Para: FCAC will operate normally. Full cooling capability is available, but temperature and odor control of the forward cargo compartment will be degraded. Temperature sensitive cargo, live animals, and cargo with strong odors should not be carried in the forward cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details
